copilotPolicyLocationScope.locationExclusivity: Selecting this policy location disables all other locations for that DLP policy.
copilotPolicyLocationScope.ruleConditionExclusivity: A single DLP rule cannot combine a Content contains > Sensitive information types condition with a Content contains > Sensitivity labels condition. Use a separate rule for each condition within the same policy.
copilotPolicyLocationScope.policyPropagationDelay: Policy updates can take up to four hours to reflect in the Microsoft 365 Copilot and Copilot Chat experience.

copilotCapabilities.displayName: Sensitive information types in prompt text
copilotCapabilities.action: Prevent Copilot from processing content > Processing prompts

copilotCapabilities.displayName: Restrict external web search when prompt text contains sensitive information types
copilotCapabilities.action: Prevent Copilot from processing content > Performing Web Searches

copilotCapabilities.displayName: Sensitivity labels on supported files and emails used in response summarization
Restrict Copilot from processing external email as grounding data
copilotCapabilities.condition: Email is received from > External users
copilotCapabilities.scopeNote: Evaluates sender-domain metadata only against tenant accepted domains; email body content is not inspected.

defaults.baselineStoragePathComment: Illustrative metadata only; scripts compute artifact paths from runtime output parameters and do not consume this field.
defaults.sensitivityConditionsComment: Illustrative reference list only; scripts read the per-tier config sensitivityConditions.standard and sensitivityConditions.highSensitivity objects and do not consume this field.
